blockers.description: OAuth redirect_uri_mismatch blocking local dev auth. 127.0.0.1 callback not registered in Google Cloud Console.
blockers.action: Go to console.cloud.google.com → APIs & Services → Credentials → OAuth 2.0 Client → Add http://127.0.0.1 to Authorized redirect URIs. Takes 30 seconds.
